channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: 100 DPRK IT workers hid in Web3. They’re inside your team, not just your code.⚠️ Link inside. https://Blockchain.News/news/ethereum-foundation-ketman-project-exposes-north-korean-operatives-web3 #Web3 #Security #Crypto

item.title: HIFI cuts the bridge pain: USDC payouts across Base, Arbitrum, and Optimism settle automatically via Circle CCTP. 💥 https://Blockchain.News/news/hifi-circle-cctp-cross-chain-usdc-payouts #Crypto #Fintech #Stablecoins

item.title: Defensive pivot: VanEck trims stocks, shifts to commodities as inflation lingers and geopolitics rekindle risk. 👀 https://Blockchain.News/news/vaneck-cuts-equity-exposure-inflation-geopolitical-risks #crypto #markets #riskmanagement
